course_title: INTRODUCTION TO THE THEORY AND DESIGN OF PROGRAMMING LANGUAGES
description: Design and theory of programming languages: procedural, object-oriented, functional and logic paradigms. Serial and concurrent programming. Execution models and formal specification techniques.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: E C E/​COMP SCI  354and (COMP SCI 367 or400) or graduate/professional standing or declared in the Capstone Certificate in Computer Sciences for Professionals

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: E C E/​COMP SCI  354and (COMP SCI 367 or400) or graduate/professional standing or declared in the Capstone Certificate in Computer Sciences for Professionals
